columns.formula: If([Days To Ship] <= 2, "Express (1-2 days)", If([Days To Ship] <= 5, "Standard (3-5 days)", If([Days To Ship] <= 10, "Economy (6-10 days)", "Slow (10+ days)")))
columns.name: Ship Speed Category

metrics.formula: If(Sum([Gross Revenue]) != 0, Sum([Gross Profit]) / Sum([Gross Revenue]), 0)
metrics.name: Gross Margin Pct

columns.formula: If([ORDER_FACT/CUSTOMER_DIM/Lifetime Revenue] >= 5000, "Platinum", If([ORDER_FACT/CUSTOMER_DIM/Lifetime Revenue] >= 2000, "Gold", If([ORDER_FACT/CUSTOMER_DIM/Lifetime Revenue] >= 500, "Silver", "Bronze")))
columns.name: Customer Value Tier
